item.title: Historical Improvement Optimal Motion Planning with Model Predictive Trajectory Optimization for On-road Autonomous Vehicle
item.description:
HSL-RRT* Emergency pull over
Historical Improvement Optimal Motion Planning with Model Predictive Trajectory Optimization for On-road Autonomous Vehicle

item.title: Historical Improvement Optimal Motion Planning with Model Predictive Trajectory Optimization for On-road Autonomous Vehicle
item.description: HSL-RRT* Merge into traffic flow after the emergency pull over

item.title: Historical Improvement Optimal Motion Planning with Model Predictive Trajectory Optimization for On-road Autonomous Vehicle
item.description: EM vs RRTS* : Navigation through many obstacles

item.title: Multi-Robot Sampling-Based Motion Planning with Dynamics [maze scene]
item.description: This project develops an effective multi-robot motion planner. The approach takes into account geometric and differential constraints imposed by the obstacles and the robot dynamics by using sampling to expand a motion tree in the composite state space of all the robots.

item.title: Multi-Robot Sampling-Based Motion Planning with Dynamics [hard case]
item.description: This project develops an effective multi-robot motion planner. The approach takes into account geometric and differential constraints imposed by the obstacles and the robot dynamics by using sampling to expand a motion tree in the composite state space of all the robots.

item.title: Multi-Robot Sampling-Based Motion Planning with Dynamics [hard case]
item.description: This project develops an effective multi-robot motion planner. The approach takes into account geometric and differential constraints imposed by the obstacles and the robot dynamics by using sampling to expand a motion tree in the composite state space of all the robots.

item.title: Multi-Robot Sampling-Based Motion Planning with Dynamics [general scene]
item.description: This project develops an effective multi-robot motion planner. The approach takes into account geometric and differential constraints imposed by the obstacles and the robot dynamics by using sampling to expand a motion tree in the composite state space of all the robots.

item.title: Incorporating High-Level Tasks into Motion Planning with Dynamics [INTERACT]
item.description: This project proposes an interactive search approach, termed INTERACT, which couples sampling-based motion planning withaction planning in order to effectively solve the combined task- and motion-planning problem. INTERACT is geared toward sce-narios involving a mobile robot operating in a fully-known environment consisting of static and movable objects

item.title: Guiding Sampling-Based Tree Search for Motion Planning with Dynamics via Probabilistic Roadmap Abstractions[snake robot]
item.description: This project focuses on motion-planning problems for high-dimensional mobile robots with nonlinear dynamics operating incomplex environments. It is motivated by a recent framework that combines sampling-based motion planning in the state spacewith discrete search over a workspace decomposition

item.title: Guiding Sampling-Based Tree Search for Motion Planning with Dynamics via Probabilistic Roadmap Abstractions [car vehicle]
item.description: This project focuses on motion-planning problems for high-dimensional mobile robots with nonlinear dynamics operating incomplex environments. It is motivated by a recent framework that combines sampling-based motion planning in the state spacewith discrete search over a workspace decomposition

item.title: Guiding Sampling-Based Tree Search for Motion Planning with Dynamics via Probabilistic Roadmap Abstractions [blimp robot]
item.description: This project focuses on motion-planning problems for high-dimensional mobile robots with nonlinear dynamics operating incomplex environments. It is motivated by a recent framework that combines sampling-based motion planning in the state spacewith discrete search over a workspace decomposition
